'''''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: The Official Strategy Guide''''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games|Prima's Secrets of the Games]] for both the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] and [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]] versions of ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''.

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''With ''Shadows of the Empire: The Official Strategy Guide'', you'll learn how to defeat Boba Fett and IG-88, blast Imperial baddies, and get the secrets you'll need to ultimately destroy Prince Xizor and his Skyhook, including:''

''*All the locations of the secret Rebel challenge points''
''*Step-by-step walkthroughs for every mission''
''*Jet-packed flight skills that will propel you to victory''
''*Maps for selected levels''
